segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translation.text: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Our dog, Rex, used to sit outside our front gate and bark.

translation.text: 我们的狗雷克斯过去常坐在前门外面叫。

segments.text: Every time he wanted to come into the garden, he would bark until someone opened the gate.

translation.text: 每当它想进花园时，就会一直叫到有人把门打开。

segments.text: As the neighbors complained of the noise, my husband spent weeks training him to press his paw on the latch to let himself in.

translation.text: 由于邻居抱怨噪声，丈夫花了几个星期训练它用爪子按门闩，自己把门打开。

segments.text: Rex soon became an expert at opening the gate.

translation.text: 雷克斯很快就成了开门的行家。

segments.text: However, when I was going out shopping last week, I noticed him in the garden near the gate.

translation.text: 然而，上星期我出门购物时，注意到它待在花园里靠近大门的地方。

segments.text: This time he was barking so that someone would let him out.

translation.text: 这次它不停地叫，是想让人放它出去。

segments.text: Since then, he has developed another bad habit.

translation.text: 从那以后，它又养成了一个坏习惯。

segments.text: As soon as he opens the gate from the outside, he comes into the garden and waits until the gate shuts.

translation.text: 它从外面一打开门，就走进花园，等着门关上。

segments.text: Then he sits and barks until someone lets him out.

translation.text: 接着，它坐下来不停地叫，直到有人放它出去。

segments.text: After this, he immediately lets himself in and begins barking again.

translation.text: 然后，它立刻又自己开门进来，再次叫起来。

segments.text: Yesterday, my husband removed the gate and Rex got so annoyed we have not seen him since.

translation.text: 昨天，丈夫把大门拆掉了，雷克斯气得跑掉了，此后我们再也没见过它。
